_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for every Silverback site. Edit values here and run `node build.mjs` to regenerate every site. Never edit generated index.html directly.

chatbot.name: OBI
chatbot.greeting: Hi, I'm OBI — Mr. Chigbu's intake assistant. Ask me about bankruptcy, immigration, family law, or personal injury, and I'll get a real human to follow up. Everything is confidential.

law.disclaimer: This website is attorney advertising. The information on this site is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. No attorney-client relationship is formed by use of this site or by submission of an intake form. Past results do not guarantee future outcomes. Licensed in the State of California.

defaults.tagline: Mobile CARB testing — we come to your yard, lot, or jobsite — weekends included, fleets our specialty.

chatbot.name: VIN
chatbot.greeting: Hey, I'm VIN. Need a CARB test, pricing, or scheduling help? I'll get you a real human fast.
chatbot._alertWebhookNote: Optional. POST destination for new chat messages — e.g. a Make.com / Zapier webhook that texts or emails you. Leave blank to just store in KV.

faq.q: How fast can you come out?
faq.a: Same-day in most cases. We run 24/7 — call or text any time.
Yes — fleets are our specialty. Volume discounts available.
Yes, weekends and after-hours included at no extra charge.
Same pricing as trucks. New (2013+) is OBD at the lower price; older is OVI smoke.

sites.firmName: Clifford C. Chigbu, Attorney at Law
sites.region: Elk Grove and surrounding areas — Sacramento, Davis, Lodi, Stockton, Jackson, Galt, and the greater Central Valley
sites._serviceAreasNote: Wider service area beyond Elk Grove. Clifford is well-known for Family Law and Immigration — and serves clients across the greater Sacramento / Central Valley region. Used for SEO keywords + Service Areas section on the home page.
sites._emailNote: Locked — client cannot change. Do not 'fix' the spelling. This is also the fallback email for ALL form submissions and chat messages — every intake, contact form, and OBI chat message gets emailed here as a backup in case the webhook / agent is down.
sites._fromEmailNote: Sending address for the fallback emails. Must have SPF/DKIM set up in Cloudflare DNS for MailChannels, OR use Resend with this domain verified. Free Resend tier is 100 emails/day — more than enough.
sites._domainNote: Domain is plural 'chigbulaws.com' (inherited from prior webmaster). Do not 'correct' it.
sites.addressForMaps: Chigbu Law Firm, Elk Grove, CA
sites._addressNote: Replace addressForMaps with the exact street address once confirmed. Get Directions button auto-generates a Google Maps deep link from this.
sites._googleNote: Once you have the Google Place ID, paste it into googlePlaceId and we'll wire up native review writing. Get the Place ID at https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/place-id
sites._analyticsNote: Cloudflare Web Analytics token (free, no cookies) OR GA4 measurement ID (G-XXXXXXXXXX) OR Plausible domain. Set any/all — they render independently. Cloudflare Web Analytics = Cloudflare dashboard → Analytics → Web Analytics → Add a site → copy the token from the beacon script.

reviews.author: Verified client

reviews.author: Verified client
reviews.text: He helped my family through the immigration process when no one else would even return our calls. Forever grateful.

reviews.author: Verified client
reviews.text: Honest. Patient. Doesn't promise things he can't deliver — and then delivers more than he promised.

sites._themeNote: Deep navy + warm gold. Refined, trustworthy, no clichéd lawyer-stock-photo feel. Adjust freely in this object.
sites.eyebrow: Top-Rated Family & Immigration Attorney · Elk Grove, CA
sites.headline: Proudly serving Elk Grove and surrounding areas as a Top-Rated Family Law & Immigration Attorney.
sites.subheadline: Your dedicated legal advocate serving Elk Grove, Sacramento, Davis, Lodi, Stockton, Jackson, and the greater Central Valley. Life's unexpected challenges often demand experienced, compassionate representation — that's what Clifford Chigbu has been providing families for years.
sites.metaDescription: Clifford C. Chigbu, Attorney at Law — Top-rated Family Law and Immigration attorney serving Elk Grove, Sacramento, Davis, Lodi, Stockton, and Jackson. Divorce, custody, green cards, citizenship, and more. Call (916) 230-6381.
sites.keywords: Clifford Chigbu, Chigbu law, Elk Grove family law attorney, Elk Grove immigration lawyer, divorce lawyer Elk Grove, immigration attorney Sacramento, family law Davis, immigration lawyer Lodi, Stockton family law, Jackson immigration attorney, child custody Sacramento, green card attorney Elk Grove, Nigerian American attorney, Attorney at Law Elk Grove, Central Valley family law
sites.aboutHtml:
Clifford Chigbu is a California attorney and your dedicated legal advocate in Elk Grove. He's built his solo practice around one idea: families going through hard times deserve a lawyer who answers the phone, tells them the truth, and treats their case like it matters — because it does.

He doesn't fill the office with photos of himself or walls of diplomas. He fills it with clients who walk in worried and walk out with a plan. Whether you're navigating divorce, custody, or any of life's unexpected legal challenges, you'll get straight answers and experienced representation.

If a case isn't a fit, he'll tell you. If it is, he'll fight for it like it's his own.
sites._aboutHtmlNote: Placeholder — rewrite with his actual bio text once we have it. Current version synthesized from his site's tagline ('Your Dedicated Legal Advocates in Elk Grove') and what the user has told me about him.

practiceAreas.name: Family Law
practiceAreas.blurb: Top-rated family law attorney in Elk Grove. Divorce, custody, child & spousal support, restraining orders, adoption.
practiceAreas.areaHeadline: Family decisions are personal. Your lawyer should be too.
practiceAreas.areaSubhead: Divorce, custody, support, restraining orders, adoption — direct representation from a top-rated Elk Grove attorney who actually knows your name.

process.text: 6 questions to help us understand what kind of help you need.
We sit down (or video call) and lay out your options, timelines, and likely outcomes.
Filing, negotiation, or trial — whatever protects you and your kids best.

areaFaq.q: How long does a divorce take in California?
areaFaq.a: Six months minimum from the date the other party is served. Most cases settle before trial.

areaFaq.q: Do I need to go to court?
areaFaq.a: Often no — many family law matters resolve through negotiation or mediation. But if court is needed, we're ready.

areaFaq.q: What if I can't afford this right now?
areaFaq.a: We offer payment plans for most family matters. Tell us your situation honestly and we'll work with you.

practiceAreas.name: Immigration
practiceAreas.blurb: Family-based petitions, green cards, naturalization, deportation defense, work visas.
practiceAreas.areaSubhead: Mr. Chigbu came here from Nigeria. He understands what's at stake — and he treats every client's case like it's his family's.
bullets: Family-based green cards and visa petitions
Work visas (H-1B, L-1, O-1) and PERM
DACA renewals and adjustment of status

process.text: 6 quick questions. Everything on this page is confidential.
Mr. Chigbu personally reviews — not a paralegal. He'll tell you what's possible and what's not.
We handle the petitions, the agencies, and we keep you informed at every step.

areaFaq.q: Is it safe to fill out this form if I'm undocumented?
areaFaq.a: Yes. Everything you submit is protected by attorney-client confidentiality the moment we receive it.
Yes. If you or a family member is in removal proceedings, contact us today — timing matters.

areaFaq.q: How long does it take to get a green card?
areaFaq.a: It depends on the category and country of origin — anywhere from months to years. We'll give you a realistic timeline.

intake.name: goal
intake.label: What outcome are you hoping for?

practiceAreas.name: Personal Injury
practiceAreas.blurb: Car accidents, slip and fall, dog bites, workplace injuries. No fee unless we win.
practiceAreas.areaHeadline: Injured? You pay nothing unless we win.
practiceAreas.areaSubhead: Free consultation. No fees, no costs, no risk to you. We only get paid if you do.
bullets: We front all costs — you pay nothing out of pocket

process.text: Tell us what happened. We'll tell you straight whether you have a case.
We work with medical providers and gather evidence while you focus on recovery.
Most cases settle. If insurance won't be reasonable, we go to trial.

areaFaq.q: How much does this cost me?
areaFaq.a: Nothing up front. Our fee is a percentage of the recovery — only if we win.

areaFaq.q: How long do I have to file?
areaFaq.a: California's deadline (statute of limitations) is generally 2 years for personal injury, but it can be much shorter in some cases. Don't wait — call.

areaFaq.q: Should I talk to the other side's insurance?
areaFaq.a: No. Talk to us first — anything you say to them can be used to lower your settlement.

intake.name: insurance_contact
intake.label: Has any insurance company contacted you?

practiceAreas.name: Bankruptcy
practiceAreas.blurb: Chapter 7 and Chapter 13. Stop garnishments, foreclosure, harassment from creditors.
practiceAreas.areaHeadline: Stop the harassment. Get your life back.
practiceAreas.areaSubhead: Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy in California. Most clients walk out of the first meeting with a real plan and a real number.
bullets: Stop wage garnishments — usually within 24 hours of filing
Wipe out qualifying credit card, medical, and personal-loan debt
Payment plans available for filing fees and attorney fees

process.text: 6 questions on this page. Takes about 90 seconds.
Mr. Chigbu reviews and tells you straight whether bankruptcy is your best move — and which chapter.
If we move forward, the automatic stay stops creditor action the moment we file.

areaFaq.a: Usually no. California's homestead exemption protects most home equity for primary residences. We'll review your specific situation.
Chapter 7 typically wraps in 3–4 months. Chapter 13 is a 3–5 year plan.
Bankruptcy stays on your credit 7–10 years, but most clients see scores recover faster than they expected — and you start from zero debt.

practiceAreas.name: Business & Contract Law
practiceAreas.blurb: Contract drafting and review, business formation, disputes, and negotiation.
practiceAreas.areaHeadline: Business decisions that hold up in court.
practiceAreas.areaSubhead: Contracts, formations, and disputes handled by a California attorney who's been doing this for years.

process.text: 6 questions to understand what you're working on.
We look at your contract, situation, or dispute and tell you what's enforceable and what's not.
Draft, revise, negotiate, or litigate — whatever the matter needs.

areaFaq.q: Do I really need a lawyer to form an LLC?
areaFaq.a: Not legally — but DIY filings often miss operating agreement details that matter when disputes come up later. A small upfront investment saves big headaches.

areaFaq.q: Someone breached our contract. What now?
areaFaq.a: Call us before you send any demand letters. What you say early can affect the remedies you have later.

areaFaq.q: Can you review a contract before I sign it?
areaFaq.a: Yes — and we strongly recommend it for anything significant. Flat-rate reviews available.

intake.name: other_party
intake.label: Who is the other party? (vendor, partner, customer, etc.)

faq.a: Personal injury consultations are free — and PI cases are handled on contingency, meaning no fee unless we win. For other matters, we charge a modest consultation fee that's credited toward your case if you decide to retain us.

faq.q: Do you take cases on a payment plan?
faq.a: For most matters, yes. We'll work out something that fits your situation in the first meeting.
English and Igbo. We can also arrange interpreters for Spanish and other languages on request.
Elk Grove, California — serving the greater Sacramento area. We meet by appointment and also do phone and video consultations.
Same day or next day in most cases. Call the number on this page.

faq.q: Are you really a licensed attorney?
faq.a: Yes — Mr. Chigbu is an active member in good standing of the State Bar of California. You can verify any time at calbar.ca.gov.
